Bus Timings

Dubai Bus 25: Full Route and Stops Guide

March 21, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Bus 25 in Dubai provides a vital link between Gold Souq Bus Station and Rashidiya Bus Station Parking, offering a comprehensive route through key areas of the city.

The bus operates with frequent services throughout the day, ensuring convenience and accessibility for passengers. Its well-planned route and reliable service make it an essential component of Dubai’s public transport network.

Route Name 25
Route Description Gold Souq Bus Station · 24 - Rashidiya Bus Station Parking
Total Distance Approximately 15 to 22.5 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 45 minutes
Operational Hours 04:00 to 23:30 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 5
Official Website RTA Dubai

Download PDF Bus 25

Bus Timings

Bus 25 operates with frequent service throughout the day. Here are the timings for each direction:

  • From Rashidiya Bus Station Parking: 05:00, 06:00, 06:30, 07:00, 07:20, 07:40, 08:00, 08:25, 08:50, 09:15, 09:40, 10:05, 10:30, 11:05, 11:40, 12:10, 12:40, 13:15, 13:45, 14:15, 14:45, 15:10, 15:35, 16:00, 16:20, 16:40, 17:00, 17:20, 17:42, 18:04, 18:24, 18:44, 19:06, 19:28, 19:48, 20:12, 20:35, 21:00, 21:30, 22:05, 22:35, 23:00, 23:30

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for riding Bus 25 is AED 5. This price provides a cost-effective option for traveling across the entire route. Whether you are a daily commuter or an occasional traveler, the fare is designed to be affordable while ensuring quality service and convenience. Additionally, the value of the fare is enhanced by the bus’s comprehensive route and frequent service, making it a practical choice for navigating Dubai.

Bus Booking

Currently, Bus 25 does not offer online booking options. The app also allows users to check bus schedules, plan their journeys, and view live bus locations.

Bus Route

Bus 25 traverses a diverse route across Dubai, connecting notable locations and providing access to various points of interest. The route starts at Gold Souq Bus Station · 24 and includes the following stops:

  1. Gold Souq Bus Station · 24

  2. Naif, Intersection

  3. Burj Nahar, Intersection

  4. Nakhal

  5. Union Metro · 1

  6. Etisalat Head Office

  7. Maktoum Road

  8. Clock Tower Roundabout

  9. DNATA

  10. Flame Intersection

  11. Garhoud, Intersection

  12. Airport Terminal 1, External Parking

  13. Emirates Airlines Headquarters

  14. Gulf & Safa Diaries

15.

  1. Veterinary Clinic

  2. Police Station

  3. Al Jahiz Boys School

  4. Rashidiya, Street 38

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Rashidiya Bus Station, Arrival

  2. Rashidiya Bus Station Parking

The return route from Rashidiya Bus Station Parking to Gold Souq Bus Station · 24 follows the same stops in reverse order.

Bus 25 Station Overview

Gold Souq Bus Station · 24

Gold Souq Bus Station · 24 is a key transit point situated near the bustling Gold Souq area, a popular destination for shopping and exploring traditional markets in Dubai. The station is well-equipped with essential amenities, including sheltered waiting areas, ticketing services, and real-time schedule updates.

Its central location makes it a convenient stop for shoppers and tourists visiting the Gold Souq, providing easy access to the vibrant marketplace and surrounding attractions. The station’s facilities and strategic placement enhance the overall travel experience for passengers heading to and from this lively commercial area.

Intersection of Bus Routes at Burj Nahar Intersection

This central location offers seamless connections between these diverse routes, making it a crucial point for passengers traveling throughout Dubai. The stop is well-equipped with essential amenities and real-time schedule updates, providing a convenient and efficient travel experience for commuters using these intersecting bus services.

Rashidiya Bus Station Parking

Rashidiya Bus Station Parking serves as an important transportation hub in the Rashidiya area, offering a dedicated parking area for buses and convenient access for commuters. The station provides essential amenities such as sheltered waiting areas, ticketing services, and up-to-date bus schedule information.

Its location supports efficient transit operations and facilitates smooth travel for passengers in the Rashidiya region. The parking facility ensures that buses can efficiently manage passenger flow while offering a reliable transit option for local residents and visitors using the Rashidiya Bus Station.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

There are several notable tourist attractions and destinations along the Bus 25 route:

  1. Gold Souq Bus Station · 24: Located near the famous Gold Souq in Dubai, a bustling market known for its extensive range of gold and jewelry shops.

  2. Naif, Intersection: Close to the vibrant Naif Souq, a traditional market offering textiles, electronics, and various goods.

  3. Burj Nahar, Intersection: Near the Burj Nahar, a historical watchtower that provides a glimpse into Dubai’s past.

  4. Union Metro · 1: A key transportation hub in Dubai, offering access to the Union Metro Station, which connects to multiple lines.

  5. Etisalat Head Office: While primarily a corporate building, it’s situated in an area with various commercial and dining options.

  6. Clock Tower Roundabout: A prominent landmark and historical monument, one of Dubai’s most recognizable symbols.

7.

  1. Flame Intersection: Located near the Garhoud area, known for its vibrant community and dining options.

  2. Airport Terminal 1, External Parking: Provides access to Dubai International Airport, a major travel hub with various amenities and shopping options.

  3. Emirates Airlines Headquarters: The headquarters of one of the world’s leading airlines, located in the vicinity of several modern developments.

11.

12.

  1. Veterinary Clinic: While not a tourist spot, it serves the community with pet care services.

  2. Police Station: Provides essential services and safety to the area.

  3. Al Jahiz Boys School: A local educational institution contributing to the community’s development.

  4. Rashidiya Bus Station, Arrival: A major bus terminal that connects various parts of Dubai, facilitating further exploration of the city.

These locations provide a mix of cultural, historical, and modern experiences for visitors traveling on Bus 25.

Traveling with Careem

With the Careem app, you can conveniently travel to Rashidiya Bus Station Parking, the furthest point on the Bus 25 route, starting from Gold Souq Bus Station · 24. The fare for this journey ranges between AED 56 and AED 67, making it a cost-effective option for reaching your destination comfortably and efficiently.

Dubai Bus 25 is a well-integrated part of the city’s public transport system, offering extensive coverage and reliable service. Its route connects major commercial and residential areas, providing essential access across Dubai. With frequent service and an affordable fare, it caters effectively to the needs of both regular commuters and visitors exploring the city. For real-time updates and journey planning, the RTA app remains a valuable resource for passengers.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: March 21, 2026.
